mapper.select: select * from activity_registration where user_id = #{userId} and activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.insert: insert into activity_registration(user_id, activity_id, register_time, status) values(#{userId}, #{activityId}, #{registerTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: select ar.*, u.nickname as userName, u.avatar as userAvatar from activity_registration ar left join user u on ar.user_id = u.user_id where ar.activity_id = #{activityId} order by ar.register_time desc
select count(*) from activity_registration where activity_id = #{activityId}
